properties.remark: HOG SHELTER DESTROYED BETWEEN DETROIT AND PITTSFIELD.

POSSIBLE TORNADO BEGAN NEAR MARTINSBURG AND TRAVELED NORTHEAST TO JUST WEST OF DETROIT. PARKS LIVESTOCK SUSTAINED SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE TO A HOG SHELTER 1W OF DETROIT. DAMAGE TO MULTIPLE FARM BUILDINGS...POLE BARNS...TREES...AND POWER LINES REPORTED ALONG TRACK...IN ADDITION TO SIDING DAMAGE ON OTHER STRUCTURES. APPROXIMATE LENGTH OF DAMAGE PATH 12 MILES.

ONE HOME HAD ALL WINDOWS SHATTERED AND MOST ROOF SHINGLES REMOVED. A 30 TO 40 YARD ROW OF PINE TREES WERE SHEARED OFF NEAR THE BASE. SEVERAL LARGE 2 TO 3 FOOT DIAMETER TREES WERE ALSO SNAPPED. 3 LARGE MACHINE SHEDS WERE ALSO SEVERELY DAMAGED.

ONE HOME HAD ALL WINDOWS SHATTERED AND MOST ROOF SHINGLES REMOVED. A 30 TO 40 YARD ROW OF PINE TREES WERE SHEARED OFF NEAR THE BASE. SEVERAL LARGE 2 TO 3 FOOT DIAMETER TREES WERE ALSO SNAPPED. 3 LARGE MACHINE SHEDS WERE ALSO SEVERELY DAMAGED.
HOG SHELTER DESTROYED BETWEEN DETROIT AND PITTSFIELD.
